title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Groww - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Groww - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Groww in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Groww:
Groww is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww!
